app.title: GitHub CLI now collects pseudoanonymous telemetry
app.author: ingve
app.description: GitHub CLI is a fast and simple way to work with repositories from the terminal.
proposed_tests: Run a simple command like `gh repo list`
Compare CLI output vs GitHub Web UI
